metadata.title: Seven Wonders (2017 Remaster)
metadata.album: Tango in the Night (2017 Remaster) [Deluxe Edition]
metadata.lyrics:
[00:16.93] So long ago
[00:19.68] Certain place, certain time
[00:25.41] You touched my hand all the way
[00:29.76] All the way down to Emmeline
[00:33.25] But if our paths never cross
[00:38.16] Well, you know I'm sorry but
[00:40.83] If I live to see the Seven Wonders
[00:44.65] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[00:48.73] I'll never live to match the beauty again
[00:54.92] The rainbow's edge
[00:58.79] 
[01:13.24] So it's hard to find
[01:15.50] Someone with that kind of intensity
[01:21.30] You touched my hand, I played it cool
[01:26.11] And you reached out your hand to me
[01:29.52] But if our paths never cross
[01:34.13] Well, no I'm not sorry but
[01:36.89] If I live to see the Seven Wonders
[01:41.08] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[01:45.07] I'll never live to match the beauty again
[01:51.55] The rainbow's end
[01:55.22] 
[02:17.91] So long ago
[02:20.53] It's a certain time, it's a certain place
[02:25.74] You touched my hand and you smiled
[02:30.96] All the way back, you held out your hand
[02:34.59] But I hope, and if I pray
[02:38.88] Ooh, it might work out someday
[02:41.80] If I live to see the Seven Wonders
[02:45.59] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[02:49.76] I'll never live to match the beauty again
[02:57.94] If I live to see the Seven Wonders (if I live to see the Seven Wonders)
[03:01.89] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end (I'll make a path there)
[03:05.89] I'll never live to match the beauty again
[03:11.23] (That same, same beauty again)
[03:13.70] If I live to see the Seven Wonders (if I live to see the)
[03:17.96] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[03:21.39] I'll never live to match the beauty again (well if I hope and I pray, well)
[03:27.37] (Maybe it might work out someday)
[03:30.09] If I live to see the Seven Wonders (if I live to see the Seven Wonders)
[03:30.60]
